narrative: ECB Schnabel warns current Eurozone shocks cannot be looked through, highlighting policy divergence as the Fed 3.75% vs ECB 2.25% carry spread (+150bp) anchors EUR/USD at 1.1436. The dollar firms as gold consolidates +0.98% near $4,166, while equities rise +0.77%, DXY consolidates +0.10%, and VIX holds at 15.9. USD/JPY tests 162.25 on a +275bp carry advantage, though extreme retail short positioning (86%) and a moderate options put skew (25d RR at -1.43) signal reversal risks. Watch the next RBNZ meeting on July 8 as the next key policy catalyst.
